data.title: New report predicts humanoids to revolutionize food manufacturing in 6 years due to labor crisis.
data.description: In Dallas on January 20, 2026, Value Gene Consulting Group unveiled a report titled "How Humanoids Will Transform Food Manufacturing," predicting the potential mass integration of humanoids in the food industry within six years. The report represents a thorough analysis of the impact of humanoids in this sector, offering unique insights into the future of food manufacturing.

data.title: Perry's Steakhouse & Grille to open in Omaha in summer 2027, marking its first Nebraska location.
data.description: A new mixed-use destination spanning 200 acres, Avenue One, is set to open in summer 2027 in West Omaha. Perry's Restaurants, a renowned group based in Texas known for its award-winning restaurants, revealed plans for their inaugural Nebraska location, Perry's Steakhouse. The location in Omaha marks a significant expansion for the restaurant group, which has garnered acclaim for its high-quality dining experiences. This announcement was made on January 20, 2026, in Omaha, Nebraska.

data.title: In 2026, enterprise AI investment focuses on ROI; Datatonic aids in building scalable, defensible systems for business impact.
data.description: The focus on AI investment is evolving in 2026 from experimentation to deployment, where organizations are now prioritizing measurable ROI as a fundamental factor. Datatonic emphasizes the importance of avoiding productivity losses and assists companies in constructing reliable AI systems that are ready for production, ensuring scalable and impactful business outcomes.

data.title: Printemps New York, powered by Jesta I.S., thrives with Merchandising ERP, Mobile Store Inventory Management. It went live on Vision Suite in March 2025, supporting U.S. expansion.
data.description: In its second year of operations, Printemps New York, the renowned French luxury retailer, is thriving with the support of Jesta I.S. technology. The flagship U.S. store, operational since March 2025, relies on Jesta's Merchandising ERP, Mobile Store Inventory Management, and Analytics solutions. These tools are instrumental in enhancing operational efficiency, facilitating data-informed decision-making, and aiding in the strategic expansion efforts in the American market.

data.title: Mask Network now governs Lens Protocol with $0.63 MASK price. Integrating $100M venture arm, they cater to 50K+ monthly users.
data.description: Mask Network has acquired control of Lens Protocol from Avara, merging a $100 million venture arm with decentralized social infrastructure, now catering to over 50,000 monthly users. Learn more about the acquisition and expansion.

data.title: National Restaurant Association appoints Keri Stockland as CFO. She will drive financial strategy for the Association.
data.description: Experienced executive Keri Stockland has been appointed as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the National Restaurant Association, as of January 20, 2026. In her new position, Stockland will be responsible for overseeing the financial strategy of the association, guiding it into the next phase. This move aims to capitalize on Stockland's expertise to drive the financial decision-making process.
REEVES SAYS NOT IN BRITAIN'S INTEREST NOT TO ENGAGE WITH CHINA

data.title: Toku launches $1B stablecoin payroll on Polygon (MATIC), expanding to 100+ countries. Integrates with ADP, Workday, Gusto for worldwide instant payments.
data.description: Toku has implemented a compliant stablecoin payroll system on the Polygon (MATIC) network, handling a whopping $1 billion in transactions every year. Through partnerships with ADP, Workday, and Gusto, Toku can facilitate immediate global payments for employees.

data.title: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) will distribute 5.833 cents per unit in January 2026, totaling 70 cents annually.
data.description: Dream Industrial REIT (TSX: DIR.UN) has declared its January 2026 monthly distribution at 5.833 cents per Unit (equivalent to 70 cents annually). This distribution will be paid on February 13, 2026, to unitholders of record as of January 30, 2026. As of September 30, 2025, Dream Industrial REIT is the owner, manager, and operator of a diverse portfolio of industrial properties.

data.title: Dream Office REIT declares 8.333 cents monthly distribution per REIT Unit in January 2026, totaling $1.00 annually.
data.description: Dream Office REIT (TSX: D.UN) declared a monthly distribution of 8.333 cents ($1.00 annually) per REIT Unit, Series A ("REIT A Units") for January 2026. The distribution is payable on February 13, 2026, to unitholders as of January 30, 2026. Dream Office REIT, an unincorporated real estate investment trust, is a leading office landlord in downtown Toronto with a portfolio exceeding 4.0 million square feet.

data.title: DRINKS and Commerce7 partner to provide digital commerce for 100+ wineries through DRINKS Anywhere Supplier Network.
data.description: LOS ANGELES - DRINKS, a prominent digital distribution platform for beverage alcohol, has collaborated with Commerce7, a top DTC sales platform for the wine sector. This partnership will enable the inclusion of Commerce7's full winery collection, comprising hundreds of premium wine labels, in the DRINKS Anywhere supplier network. By integrating the Commerce7 portfolio, DRINKS broadens its decentralized distribution approach, revolutionizing online consumer access for wineries. This move showcases the commitment to enhancing consumer experience and expanding market reach, offering a diverse selection of premium wines to a wider audience.

data.title: SandboxAQ launches AQAffinity AI model for rapid drug potency prediction, boosting OpenFold3 in drug discovery.
data.description: A cutting-edge AI model called AQAffinity has been introduced by SandboxAQ to revolutionize the early-stage drug discovery process by swiftly predicting binding affinity without the need for complex structures. This innovative technology, OpenFold3, aims to overcome a significant obstacle in the industry. The launch was announced in Palo Alto, California, on January 20, 2026. This breakthrough is set to significantly impact commercial drug development by streamlining the process and enhancing efficiency.

data.title: Etherfuse and Shinhan Securities collaborate to expand tokenized sovereign debt access in Asia.
data.description: In Irvine, California, on January 20, 2026, Etherfuse announced a strategic collaboration with Shinhan Securities, a top securities firm in Asia. This partnership aims to facilitate the increase and institutional dispersal of tokenized sovereign debt in Asia. This move signifies the coming together of two significant players in the industry to tap into the potential of this market. Etherfuse and Shinhan Securities plan to leverage their expertise to propel the distribution of tokenized sovereign debt in the region. This strategic alliance aims to capitalize on the growing interest in tokenized assets, with a focus on Asia where there is a substantial opportunity for market expansion.
Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister: The first phase of the ceasefire agreement in Gaza has been completed, but this does not mean that the agreement has been fully implemented.

data.title: Schlage remains most trusted lock brand for 7th year in a row, according to annual study.
data.description: For the seventh consecutive year, Schlage®, a renowned leader in home security and access solutions with a legacy of over a century, has been named the most trusted brand for door locks. This recognition comes from an annual study conducted in Carmel, Indiana, with results published on January 20, 2026. Schlage® secured its top position in the industry, showcasing consistent reliability and customer trust. The study underlines Schlage’s® dominance in the market, highlighting its unparalleled reputation for security and quality.

data.title: GoTu and SoFi partner to offer dental professionals financial tools for debt management and future planning. (Characters: 101)
data.description: In a recent development on January 20, 2026, GoTu Technology, a prominent dental talent marketplace in the US, unveiled a strategic collaboration with SoFi. This exclusive partnership aims to equip dental professionals with specialized financial resources to effectively navigate debt management and future financial planning. SoFi, widely recognized as a comprehensive digital financial services provider, will offer tailored solutions to dental professionals through this alliance. As a premier provider in the industry, GoTu Technology’s partnership with SoFi is set to provide valuable financial tools to support the unique needs of dental professionals, facilitating their journey towards financial well-being.
